title: Dependency Review Build Failure
body:
On PRs to main:
```
Run GOMEMLIMIT=12GiB govulncheck -C '.' -format text --tags=unit,allcomponents,integration ./...
=== Symbol Results ===

Vulnerability #1: GO-2026-4815
    OOM from malicious IFD offset in golang.org/x/image/tiff
  More info: https://pkg.go.dev/vuln/GO-2026-4815
  Module: golang.org/x/image
    Found in: golang.org/x/image@v0.25.0
    Fixed in: golang.org/x/image@v0.38.0
    Example traces found:
Error:       #1: tests/integration/suite/daprd/serviceinvocation/http/streaming/chunkedresponse.go:150:25: streaming.chunkedresponse.Run calls io.SectionReader.Read, which calls tiff.buffer.ReadAt

Your code is affected by 1 vulnerability from 1 module.
This scan also found 1 vulnerability in packages you import and 1 vulnerability
in modules you require, but your code doesn't appear to call these
vulnerabilities.
Use '-show verbose' for more details.
Error: Process completed with exit code 3.
```
unrelated PR https://github.com/dapr/dapr/actions/runs/23558437587/job/68591525572?pr=9685

seen in pr https://github.com/dapr/dapr/pull/9685
